    • models/Friendship
    • FriendshipDTO

    Type Alias FriendshipDTO

    A friendship/friend-request as delivered to the client. Mirrors the backend FriendshipResponse.

    type FriendshipDTO = {
        addresseeID: string;
        createdAt: string;
        friendAvatarUrl?: string | null;
        friendDisplayName?: string | null;
        friendUserID?: string | null;
        friendUsername?: string | null;
        id: string;
        requesterAvatarUrl?: string | null;
        requesterDisplayName?: string | null;
        requesterID: string;
        requesterUsername?: string | null;
        status: number;
    }
    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:3
    Index

    Properties

    addresseeID createdAt friendAvatarUrl? friendDisplayName? friendUserID? friendUsername? id requesterAvatarUrl? requesterDisplayName? requesterID requesterUsername? status

    Properties

    addresseeID

    addresseeID: string

    The user who received the request.

    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:10

    createdAt

    createdAt: string

    Creation timestamp (ISO-8601 string).

    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:15

    OptionalfriendAvatarUrl

    friendAvatarUrl?: string | null

    The friend's avatar URL (populated for outgoing requests / accepted friends).

    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:31

    friendDisplayName?: string | null

    The friend's display name (populated for outgoing requests / accepted friends).

    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:29

    OptionalfriendUserID

    friendUserID?: string | null

    The friend's user ID (populated for outgoing requests / accepted friends).

    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:25

    friendUsername?: string | null

    The friend's username (populated for outgoing requests / accepted friends).

    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:27

    id: string

    Friendship ID.

    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:5

    OptionalrequesterAvatarUrl

    requesterAvatarUrl?: string | null

    Requester's avatar URL (populated for incoming requests).

    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:22

    requesterDisplayName?: string | null

    Requester's display name (populated for incoming requests).

    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:20

    requesterID

    requesterID: string

    The user who sent the request.

    • Defined in models/Friendship.ts:8

    OptionalrequesterUsername

    requesterUsername?: string | null

    Requester's username (populated for incoming requests).
